completed_tasks.name: Delete the abandoned old Phase 5 (outer-tier-body-findability-galaxy-visibility) and its stale artifacts
Define new Phase 5 = 'Rendering Overhaul' (full rewrite: WorldRenderer + post-process + body-lighting unified) in ROADMAP.md
Un-bundle the 3 render problems into standalone todos; mark galaxy-disc-tilt resolved-pending-verify

human_actions_pending.action: Run /gsd-discuss-phase 5 to scope the Rendering Overhaul before planning
human_actions_pending.context: Scope is a full rendering-layer rewrite (largest of the offered options); discuss-phase recommended to settle the architecture before plans are written.

decisions.decision: Delete the old Phase 5 findability bundle; do a foundational Rendering Overhaul first instead
decisions.rationale: The bundle tried to fix three render problems at once and dead-ended on the fragile StarPointRenderer (prior HANDOFF, commit c98f56c). User: don't fix all render problems in one phase.

decisions.decision: New Phase 5 = full rendering rewrite (WorldRenderer + post-process + body-lighting unified)
decisions.rationale: User selected the largest-scope option: one coherent multi-tier rendering layer that the render debts can then be solved on top of, individually.

decisions.decision: Keep the 3 render problems as standalone tracked debts, promoted to their own later phases
decisions.rationale: They are out of scope for the overhaul; the overhaul only exposes the seams (findability floor) they plug into.

decisions.decision: CARRIED FORWARD: do NOT reintroduce the manual clip-space billboard MultiMesh (StarPointRenderer) anti-pattern
decisions.rationale: Exhaustively tried and abandoned in the old Phase 5; structurally fragile against the engine.

next_action: Run /gsd-discuss-phase 5 (recommended) then /gsd-plan-phase 5 to scope and plan the Rendering Overhaul. The three render debts in .planning/todos/pending/ are out of scope and get their own later phases.
context_notes: Planning-only restructure (quick delete-phase5-add-rendering-overhaul, 2026-06-19). No code changed; HEAD remains the kept-galaxy-tilt baseline (c82cdff). The old Phase 5 directory and its stale 05-01/02/03 plans + RESEARCH/CONTEXT/PATTERNS were git-removed. Build/baseline state unchanged from prior session: clean build, 18/18 TierClassifier tests, galaxy tilt kept in Shaders/skybox.gdshader.
